creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tatsuki Makino from comment #1)
> Isn't it a bit technical to reproduce this problem? :)
With -march=core2 build fine on any CPU.

Fails only if CPU support SSE4.1 and doesn't support AES-NI: -march=nehalem (Bloomfiled, Lynnfield and Xeon with same cores) and probably -march=penryn (Wolfdale, Yorkfield and Xeon with same cores).
But -march=core2 (Conroe/Allendale, Kentsfield and Xeon with same cores) doesn't support SSE4.1.
